task_type: Type E — governance closeout artifact (no statistical test, no DB write, no registry write)
description: Formal closeout of the P269B/P269C calendar regime research arc. C05 (Saturday vs Mon-Fri) primary H1 failed with p=0.8526. Per the P269B pre-registered single-shot stop rule, both C05 and undeclared C06 are permanently CLOSED for this arc.

p268_draw_order.detail: P268D4 draw-order (drawNumberAppear) H1 PRIMARY_FAIL (DAILY_539 p=0.3051 >= alpha=0.01). H2, H3 NOT AUTHORIZED. No re-parameterization of draw-order / exit-rank-heterogeneity is authorized.

p269a_lite_no_go.detail: P269A-Lite repo-only scouting evaluated 9 external signal families. Top candidate recommendation: NO_GO. No high-plausibility external signal found. WATCHLIST only: C05 (weekday regime) and C06 (calendar gap) — both LOW plausibility.

p269b_ready_for_registry.detail: P269B pre-registration design was READY_FOR_REGISTRY with LOW plausibility caveats. Declared single-shot primary H1: C05 Saturday vs Mon-Fri M3+ DAILY_539 two-tailed permutation. C06 was declared as secondary — NOT declared simultaneously in P269C registry entry, therefore closed alongside C05 per stop rule.

p269c_h1_result.endpoint: temporal OOS last 1765 eligible draws; evaluable (OOS intersection replay coverage) = 1494 draws

C05.description: Saturday vs Mon-Fri draw weekday / schedule regime
C05.reason: H1_PRIMARY_FAIL: p=0.8526 >= alpha=0.01. Saturday M3+ rate (3.21%) slightly lower than Mon-Fri (3.53%) — direction is slightly negative, magnitude is trivially small. Clean null consistent with L82 DAILY_539 signal space exhaustion.

C06.description: Calendar gap >= 2 days (primarily Monday draws and post-holiday draws)
C06.reason: C06 was declared as secondary in P269B design but was NOT simultaneously declared in the P269C registry entry. Per P269B stop rule: 'IF OOS primary gate p >= alpha_corrected: C05 is permanently CLOSED. C06 (if declared) is permanently CLOSED.' C06 was not declared; therefore it cannot be tested in this arc without a new genuinely new signal source and fresh pre-registration.

stop_rule_applied.rule: IF OOS primary gate p >= alpha_corrected: the test is COMPLETE and the result is NULL. C05 is permanently CLOSED. C06 (if declared) is permanently CLOSED. No re-testing with modified regime boundaries, metrics, or strategies is authorized under this pre-registration.
stop_rule_applied.verdict: p=0.8526 >> alpha=0.01 — stop rule fires, calendar regime arc permanently closed

result_consistent_with: L82: DAILY_539 H001-H008 all REJECT — signal space exhausted across 5885 draws
L103: H009 Lag-1 neighbor p=0.840 — even structurally plausible hypotheses fail
L91: BIG_LOTTO 6 randomness tests PASS — fair random process
L104/L105: Digit tail and consecutive pattern — null in 539
P267C: 0/36 cells pass Bonferroni under M3+ SSOT metric
no_signal_interpretation.direction_note: Saturday rate (3.21%) was slightly LOWER than Mon-Fri (3.53%), consistent with noise around baseline. Negative direction with p=0.8526 means no evidence for any directional effect.
no_signal_interpretation.power_note: P269B power analysis: OOS Saturday N=249 can only detect very large effects (Saturday rate >= ~5%, ~2.5x baseline). A null result proves 'no large effect' — not 'no effect whatsoever'. However, per single-shot stop rule, no re-test is authorized.
no_signal_interpretation.causal_note: Lottery RNG is independent of calendar labels. No causal mechanism exists for a Saturday effect on ball draw outcomes.

future_reopen_rule.conditions: No re-test of C05/C06 calendar regime is authorized under this pre-registration. Future research would require: (1) a genuinely new external signal source beyond repo-only evidence (e.g., confirmed structural draw-day difference from Taiwan Lottery official data), (2) a fresh pre-registration with new hypothesis ID, and (3) user authorization.
forbidden: Modified regime boundaries (e.g., weekend vs weekday, individual day testing)
Modified strategy after seeing C05 null

arc_summary.arc: P269 calendar regime (external signal scouting → design → formal H1 → closeout)
arc_summary.result: NULL — C05 and C06 calendar regime permanently closed
arc_summary.recommended_next: HOLD — per L137, no further active signal mining until P245B bias gate opens or a genuinely new external data source appears. No research is authorized within the current repo-only evidence boundary.

not_betting_advice: This artifact does not improve win rate, does not predict lottery numbers, does not authorize betting advice, and does not constitute a strategy recommendation. It is a governance closeout record only.
